title: Missing-state fault baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative missing-state or missing-required-key case.

steps.description: Publish a payload with intentionally incomplete state or omitted required keys.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the conservative missing-state handling outcome.

notes: Missing-state cases should distinguish policy-input omissions from validator or action-schema omissions during later detailed expansion.
This skeleton remains an integration asset and must not redefine required-key truth outside the frozen schema baseline.
